title: Rich Mexican Bean Stir-fry
description: A rich and juicy dish featuring a Chinese sesame sauce to complement the bold flavors of Mexican cuisine, made with plant-based-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Rinse and soak kidney beans in water for at least 4 hours or overnight. Drain and set aside.
Chop onion, garlic, and red/green peppers into thin strips.
In a large pot, heat sesame oil over medium heat. Add chopped onions and garlic, sauté until translucent.
Stir in tomato paste, chili powder, and vegetable broth. Bring to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes.
Add kidney beans, red/green peppers (if using), and stir well into the sauce.
Reduce heat to low and let it simmer for about 10-15 minutes or until beans are tender.
In a small bowl, mix together Chinese sesame sauce with a little bit of water. Stir this mixture into the bean dish.
Simmer for another 2-3 minutes to allow flavors to meld. Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary.
